---
title: "Projects — Mete Akcaoglu"
---

# Projects

Selected tools, programs, and initiatives.

## LTHD Enrollment Dashboard

An automated enrollment tracking system for the Department of Leadership, Technology, and Human Development at Georgia Southern University.

- Python scraper pulls enrollment data daily → JSON archive → R Shiny front-end
- Tracks 10 semesters of data across 887 course sections
- Deployed with daily cron updates

[View dashboard →](https://meteakca.shinyapps.io/lthd-dashboard/)

## Project GAME

*Developing and Piloting a Game Design-Based Computer Science Curriculum*

NSF-funded (#2027948, $299,895) research project designing a middle school CS curriculum built around game design with Unity 3D.

- Developed and piloted curriculum in Georgia middle schools
- Published in *TechTrends* (2022): [doi.org/10.1007/s11528-022-00782-1](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11528-022-00782-1)
- Presented at AERA and AECT conferences

## Innovation Studio

*Georgia Southern University, 2016–2021*

An interdisciplinary university makerspace I co-founded and co-directed.

- Secured ~$250,000 in funding
- Programming for university and K–12 communities
- Robotics, game design, and digital fabrication workshops

## Computational Analysis of Educational Data

A textbook co-authored with Wei Wang, Joshua Rosenberg, and Shaun Kellogg (2026).

- *A Field Guide Using R* — covers data wrangling, visualization, text mining, and machine learning for education researchers
- [Read online →](https://data-edu.github.io/computational-social-science-cookbook/)

## This Website

Built with Quarto, R, and GitHub Actions. Swiss modernist design system. Dynamic Google Scholar statistics via the `scholar` R package. Deployed to GitHub Pages on push.

- [Source on GitHub →](https://github.com/meteakca/meteakca)
